Technology Consultants

Cloud infrastructure, software delivery, and automation experts —

ready to accelerate your organization's digital transformation.

Work With Me See My Work

The Person Behind the Work

About

Anthony Owens

Founder, DefDev LLC  ·  Cloud & IaC Engineer  ·  AI/ML Practitioner  ·  Open Source Builder

Anthony possesses nearly twenty years of experience in technology — supporting businesses ranging from small MSPs to large hotel chains and major financial institutions like RBC in effectively integrating cloud technology into their operations.

He founded DefDev to help emerging and established organizations navigate the ever-evolving technology landscape, with a focus on Cloud First, Code First engineering and exceptional mentorship.

Beyond consulting, Anthony actively contributes to the cloud-native open source ecosystem — including OpenDepot, a Kubernetes-native self-hosted registry for OpenTofu and Terraform modules and providers; ferme, an end-to-end MLOps pipeline that ingests and scores the OpenTofu Registry at scale, curates fine-tuning datasets using a teacher LLM, and trains security-aware IaC code models via QLoRA; and terracreds, a credential helper for securely managing Terraform and OpenTofu secrets.

His recent engineering focus spans Agentic AI workflows, large-scale data ingestion pipelines, and fine-tuning open-weight language models for domain-specific tasks — bringing the same infrastructure-first discipline he applies to cloud engineering directly into the ML stack.

View my projects

Open Source

Projects

Tools built from real-world problems. All open source, all battle-tested.

📦 Open Source

OpenDepot

Self-hosted OpenTofu & Terraform registry

A Kubernetes-native module and provider registry built for teams that want full ownership of their IaC supply chain — no JFrog required.

KubernetesOpenTofuTerraformGo
Docs GitHub
MLOps

ferme

End-to-end MLOps pipeline for IaC security fine-tuning

Discovers and scores every module in the OpenTofu Registry via a concurrent Go ingester (Trivy + TFLint), curates QLoRA-ready training pairs using a teacher LLM, and fine-tunes security-aware IaC code models — all in a reproducible, phase-driven pipeline.

PythonGoQLoRALLMsIaC SecurityData Pipelines
GitHub
Security

terracreds

Credential helper for Terraform & OpenTofu

Securely store and retrieve Terraform and OpenTofu credentials using your OS keychain or cloud secret managers — no plaintext secrets on disk.

GoSecurityTerraformOpenTofu
GitHub

Writing

From the Blog

Thoughts on cloud infrastructure, open source, and building things in public.

OpenDepot Open Source May 23, 2026

I got tired of paying JFrog for a secure OpenTofu / Terraform registry so I built my own

Self-hosted, Kubernetes-native, and GitOps-ready — this is the story of why I built OpenDepot and what it means for teams who want full control over their IaC supply chain without the enterprise price tag.

Read on the OpenDepot blog
View all posts

Consulting

What We Do

DefDev specializes in cloud infrastructure, IaC, and cloud-native engineering. No ClickOps. No shortcuts.

Public Cloud

Proven track record helping organizations of any size accelerate market delivery and reduce costs when migrating to AWS, Azure, or GCP.

Infrastructure as Code

Custom OpenTofu and Terraform modules built to your business and regulatory needs — monolith, microservices, or event-driven architecture.

Cloud Native

Kubernetes, containers, and GitOps expertise to help you deliver worry-free, seamless deployments to any environment, at any scale.

Code First Philosophy

Every project ships with comprehensive code ensuring reliability and consistency across environments of any scale — fully documented and auditable through GitHub or your preferred VCS.

Migrate with Confidence

Experience across cannabis, finance, banking, hospitality, and healthcare — navigating complex, regulated environments to achieve your digital transformation objectives.

People Over Processes

We prioritize people to achieve outcomes collectively. Our focus is on understanding your needs to collaboratively craft World Class Experiences.

AI & Machine Learning

Building agentic workflows, data ingestion pipelines, and fine-tuned models that put domain knowledge directly into the model weights — not just the prompt.

Agentic AI

Multi-step autonomous workflows that plan, execute, and self-correct — grounded in real infrastructure context.

Data Ingestion Pipelines

High-throughput concurrent pipelines in Go and Python — from API discovery through scoring, filtering, and structured output.

Model Fine-Tuning

QLoRA and supervised fine-tuning of open-weight LLMs using carefully curated, domain-specific training pairs and teacher-student pipelines.

LLM Workflows

Teacher-student generation, quality filtering, dataset versioning, and Ollama-backed local inference — all production-grade.

This site operates on native AWS technology

We use S3 Static Website and CloudFront for asset distribution. With API Gateway, Lambda Functions, and Simple Email Service we run a low-cost, secure, serverless site, fully automated with Dagger and Terraform modules.

github.com/defdevio/defdev.io

Tell me about your project and I'll be in touch shortly.

Message Sent!

Thanks for reaching out to DefDev. Someone will be in touch shortly to discuss next steps. We look forward to working with you!

© 2025 DefDev, LLC
↑ Top

Effective Date: 02/01/2025

1. Introduction

Welcome to DefDev. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring your personal information is handled safely. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit defdev.io.

2. Information We Collect

Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, and other contact details. Usage Data: Information about how you use our Site, such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use your information to provide and improve our services, communicate with you about our services and updates, and analyze usage patterns to enhance user experience.

4. Sharing Your Information

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties except as described in this Privacy Policy. We may share your information with trusted third parties who assist in operating our Site.

5. Security

We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

6. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. Contact us at inquiries@defdev.io.

7. Contact Us

Questions about this Privacy Policy? Reach us at inquiries@defdev.io.

Effective Date: 02/01/2025

1. Introduction

Welcome to DefDev. These Terms and Conditions govern your use of defdev.io. By accessing or using our Site, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

2. Services

We provide consultancy services as described on our Site. Specific service terms will be outlined in separate agreements with each client.

3. Use of the Site

You agree to use our Site only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict, or inhibit anyone else's use and enjoyment of the Site.

4. Intellectual Property

All content on our Site, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of DefDev or its content suppliers and is protected by intellectual property laws.

5. Limitation of Liability

We are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of your use of our Site.

6. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of California. Disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of California courts.

7. Contact Us

Questions about these Terms? Contact us at inquiries@defdev.io.
